research_topic: AI orchestration engines and multi-agent frameworks
competitors: LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Dify, Semantic Kernel, Haystack, Promptflow, Langflow
our_product: YAML-based pipeline orchestrator with scenario testing, multi-executor support (Anthropic/OpenClaw/Gemini), intent preservation through phase-level prompt engineering, and built-in quality gates. Open source, runs on a Raspberry Pi. 2100+ tests. Think Docker Compose for AI pipelines.
focus_areas: intent preservation, quality gates, bias mitigation, ease of use, YAML vs code, testing frameworks, multi-model support
additional_research: Jennifer Aaker humor framework for business communication; how humor increases engagement and trust in technical content; StrongDM dark factory testing methodology
